_comment: ADOPT: every data category the solution touches, with its lifecycle disposition. Verified by scripts/data-lifecycle-check.mjs. The gate enforces the disposition is DECLARED and bounded — executing it (KMS, tokenization, deletion jobs) is your data platform's job (governance/data-protection-runbook.md). Replace these demo categories with yours. retention is a bounded period (ISO-8601 'P6Y' or '30 days'), OR { indefinite: true, justification }. erasure.method is your right-to-erasure mechanism; 'none' needs a legal-hold exemption.
